name: inline-ai
description: AI-powered inline code completion and assistance.

commands.title: AI Auto Responder: Run Inline AI Queries
AI Auto Responder: Cancel Active Request

enumDescriptions: Use a custom OpenAI-compatible endpoint with base URL, API key, and model.
aiAutoResponder.provider.description: AI provider used for inline requests.

aiAutoResponder.openRouterApiKey.markdownDescription: OpenRouter API key used when `aiAutoResponder.provider` is `openRouter`.

aiAutoResponder.openRouterModel.description: Model ID sent to OpenRouter when provider is `openRouter`.

aiAutoResponder.openAiBaseUrl.description: Base URL for OpenAI-compatible API when provider is `openAiCompatible` (for example: https://api.groq.com/openai/v1).

aiAutoResponder.openAiApiKey.description: API key for OpenAI-compatible API when provider is `openAiCompatible`.

aiAutoResponder.openAiModel.description: Model ID for OpenAI-compatible API when provider is `openAiCompatible`.

aiAutoResponder.rolePrompt.default: You are AI coding assistant which gives short answer,no markdown.Pure text and/or pure code
aiAutoResponder.rolePrompt.description: Role/system-style prompt prepended to the user @ai prompt.

aiAutoResponder.enableReasoning.description: Whether to request reasoning from compatible OpenRouter models (used only when provider is `openRouter`).

aiAutoResponder.providerSort.description: OpenRouter provider sorting strategy (for example: price, throughput, latency). Used only when provider is `openRouter`.

aiAutoResponder.wholeFileRolePrompt.default: You are an expert coding assistant. Use the provided full file context and return the best code completion or edit response for the query.short answer,no markdown.Pure text and/or pure code
aiAutoResponder.wholeFileRolePrompt.description: Role/system-style prompt used for @ai.file <query> .. requests (current file plus optional @path file references).

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
